Blockchain Ticker API

Returns current Bitcoin price in various currencies.

v1.0.01 methods

Methods

Each method below is pulled directly from the OpenAPI file.

GET/tickergetTicker

Get Bitcoin prices by currency

Responses

200

A map of currency codes to price information

YAML
